# Spring Modulith 2 violation allowlist — generated by epic #1096.
#
# Each non-blank, non-comment line is a Modulith violation message (verbatim) that the
# current codebase is allowed to have. ApplicationModulesVerificationTest fails CI for
# any NEW message not on this list.
#
# Goal of the architecture epic: empty this file. Either narrow allowedDependencies on the
# offending @ApplicationModule, or restructure the callsite into a SPI exposed by the
# upstream module.
#
# Populated on first run of `mvn -Parchitecture-tests test`; intentionally empty here so
# the first run produces the baseline diff in the CI log rather than green-by-accident.
